title: Vercel Hobby cron limitation requires platform-independent monitoring
description: Discovered that Vercel Hobby plan only allows ONE cron job per day (runs once). All DNA monitoring (5-30 min frequency) violated this limit. Investigated 5 alternatives and selected GitHub Actions for monitoring instead. This decouples monitoring from deployment infrastructure and provides superior reliability.
evidence: Vercel deployment rejected with: 'Hobby accounts are limited to daily cron jobs'
Attempted hourly schedule (0 * * * *) still failed - runs 24 times per day
GitHub Actions free tier supports unlimited scheduled workflows
Migrating to GitHub Actions restored full monitoring frequency without cost increase

title: Implement DNA-GOV-007: Knowledge Memory for organizational learning
description: Created persistent organizational learning system to capture decisions, learnings, patterns, fixes, and risks across Governor sessions. Eliminates repeated analysis and builds institutional intelligence. Includes HTTP API for query/write operations and append-only JSONL storage.
evidence: Every Governor session historically began from scratch
No mechanism to retain learnings from previous sessions
Repeated analysis wastes time and context
Implemented with 180 LoC core library + 13 comprehensive tests

title: Create Founder Decision Brief to surface blocking decisions
description: Enhanced DNA-GOV-005 with structured Founder Decision Brief that surfaces what decisions are needed, why, consequences of each choice, and recommended actions. Reduces Founder cognitive load by providing single source of truth for what's blocking launch.
evidence: Founder must manually check GitHub/governance docs to understand decisions
No structured way to know decision dependencies or consequences
Founder Decision Brief centralizes all decision context
Covers 3 immediate blocking decisions for customer launch
